title: DUAL DIAGNOSIS ANONYMOUS PEER SUPPORT GROUP - 211info
text: DUAL DIAGNOSIS ANONYMOUS OF OREGON DUAL DIAGNOSIS ANONYMOUS PEER SUPPORT GROUP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer support groups based on a 12 step model. 4141 SE Division Street Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Individuals with co-occurring mental health challenges and substance use disorders and their families Hours: Varies by meeting Email (503) 222-6484 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 222-6484 Toll-free (877) 222-1332 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for directory of local support groups FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at 11th and Alder. Max, bus (Line 15), and streetcar access. Services: Co-Occurring Disorders Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
